title: elho Barcelona Trough 40 - Plastic Planter for Balcony & Outdoor - 40cm x H 16.0 cm, 8 liter volume, Pistachio Green
features: DURABLE | The pot is built for extensive and long-term use. The colour doesn’t fade in the sun, the pot is frost resistant and it can handle a bit of dirt and rough handling; which is why you get a 2-year warranty.

CONVENIENT OVERFLOW PIPE | With the overflow pipes, your plants never get too wet. They’re protected against root rot and the plant roots are perfectly aerated. So that you can enjoy them for even longer.
MIX & MATCH | In addition to balcony planters in various colours and sizes, the Barcelona collection also offers matching hooks. That way, you can make any outdoor space greener.
RECYCLED PLASTIC | The pot is made of 100% recycled plastic, produced using wind energy and is 100% recyclable.
REMEMBER THE DISH | For the best care for your plant, a dish is very important. A dish ensures that the excess water gets drained away. The dish is not included with this product.

Our outdoor pots already have holes. Our inside pots do not have pre-drilled holes. You can place your plant with the inner pot directly into all our indoor pots. Are the elho pots weather resistant? We make products in which plastic comes into its own. We, therefore, warrant that our pots are UV-resistant, frost-resistant and that the colour will last. Are all elho products made from recycled materials? We continually strive for the most sustainable production methods. That's why we currently use 100% recycled plastic. Every day, we look for new solutions to create products in an even more sustainable way, making your life greener. What exactly does elho recycle to produce pots? The most important raw material is the plastic used by various companies that ends up as unused waste from their production processes and the elho pots that roll off the conveyor belt when machines are started up or with colour changes.
